tuning: E A D G B E
content:
That's The Way It Is - Jo Dee Messina

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  (2 times)

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Everybody wants an easy ride on the[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
merry go round that we call life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Take a drive on cruise control then you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
wake to find it's a winding road[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I had my dreams in view when the[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
money ran out and the engine blew[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Hung my tears out to dry then my[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
dreams fell out of that clear blue sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
And I, I was walking the clouds[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Feeling so safe and sound[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Something else knocks me down[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Oh that's the way it is[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
You gotta roll with the punches[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
That's the way it goes[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
You gotta bend when the wind blows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You live you learn, you crash and burn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
It's hit or miss[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
And that's the way it is[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
One fine day you wake up[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
completely hopelessly fallin in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
He's just what you're looking for the only[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
problem is that the man's not sure[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Another guy'll give you everything, only[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
problem is you don't feel a thing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Well I know from experience nothing's[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
ever gonna make perfect sense[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, one day you get what you want[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
But it's not what you think[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Then you get what you need[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Yeah, they say your soul is growing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
But sometimes I feel like throwing something[/tab]
